name: Fast MCP Claude (Remote Control)
description: Peer-to-peer remote control between Claude Code sessions over HTTP

env_vars.name: MCP_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Bearer token required from clients (REQUIRED for non-localhost)

env_vars.name: PEERS
env_vars.description: JSON array of remote peers this server can call out to

env_vars.name: WORKSPACE_ROOTS
env_vars.description: Colon-separated allowlist of directories exposed via the file bridge
